input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.9.2
            TITLE: the design judges may assign a portion of the design event points to the design documents

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.9.2: The Design Judges may assign a portion of the Design Event points to the Design Documents
S.4.9.2 The Design Judges may assign a portion of the Design Event points to the Design Documents

final_answer: S.4.9.2 The Design Judges may assign a portion of the Design Event points to the Design Documents
